references.english:
I have firmly sworn
to keep Your just rules.

references.hebrew: וַתְּהִ֥י עָלַ֛י שָׁ֖ם יַד־יְהֹוָ֑ה וַיֹּ֣אמֶר אֵלַ֗י ק֥וּם צֵא֙ אֶל־הַבִּקְעָ֔ה וְשָׁ֖ם אֲדַבֵּ֥ר אוֹתָֽךְ׃ וָאָקוּם֮ וָאֵצֵ֣א אֶל־הַבִּקְעָה֒ וְהִנֵּה־שָׁ֤ם כְּבוֹד־יְהֹוָה֙ עֹמֵ֔ד כַּכָּב֕וֹד אֲשֶׁ֥ר רָאִ֖יתִי עַל־נְהַר־כְּבָ֑ר וָאֶפֹּ֖ל עַל־פָּנָֽי׃
references.english: Then G<small>OD</small>’s hand came upon me there, and I was told, “Arise, go out to the valley, and there I will speak with you.” I arose and went out to the valley, and there stood the Presence of G<small>OD</small>, like the Presence that I had seen at the Chebar Canal; and I flung myself down on my face.
references.matched_snippet: הבקעה ושם אדבר אותך ואצא אל הבקעה

references.hebrew: וַתְּהִ֥י עָלַ֛י שָׁ֖ם יַד־יְהֹוָ֑ה וַיֹּ֣אמֶר אֵלַ֗י ק֥וּם צֵא֙ אֶל־הַבִּקְעָ֔ה וְשָׁ֖ם אֲדַבֵּ֥ר אוֹתָֽךְ׃
references.english: Then G<small>OD</small>’s hand came upon me there, and I was told, “Arise, go out to the valley, and there I will speak with you.”
references.matched_snippet: הבקעה ושם אדבר אותך ואצא אל הבקעה
